title: Wire Drawer to Conversations API (List, Create, Switch)

acceptance_criteria_met.description: Conversations fetched and displayed with loading state
acceptance_criteria_met.notes: useConversations hook fetches conversations on mount with loading, error, and empty states

acceptance_criteria_met.description: New Chat button creates conversation and navigates
acceptance_criteria_met.notes: createConversation function inserts to Supabase, refetches list, and navigates

acceptance_criteria_met.description: Conversation row tap switches active conversation
Error state displayed with retry option
acceptance_criteria_met.notes: DrawerContent shows error message with tap-to-retry functionality
Empty state shown when conversations array is empty and not loading
pnpm typecheck passed with no errors

implementation_notes: Created useConversations hook using useState + useEffect pattern (no state syncing anti-pattern)
Used supabaseAdmin client for all database operations
Sorted conversations by most recent activity (lastMessageAt or updatedAt)
New conversations get default title 'New Chat'
Hook returns: conversations, activeConversationId, isLoading, error, createConversation, switchConversation, refetch
DrawerContent updated with loading, error, and empty states
Refetch on drawer open using useDrawerStatus hook
Navigation uses Expo Router router.push() - routes to be implemented in future tasks
